aboutMe: Highly skilled and result-oriented Senior Java Developer with over 5 years of experience, specializing in building scalable, high-performance systems in banking domain. Proven expertise in Java 8, Spring Boot, Microservices and REST APIs, with strong focus on optimizing system performance and architectural design.

experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
experiences.companyDescription: An Infosys subsidiary, accelerates enterprise-wide transformations with leading Applied AI.
points: Orchestrated the transition from monolithic application to highly scalable microservice architecture using Spring Boot and RESTful APIs, dramatically enhancing system modularity and horizontal scaling capabilities.
Centralized access control by implementing Spring Cloud Gateway for all service routes, integrating custom JWT validation flter to secure microservice communication.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams, ensuring seamless integration of APIs and microservices, which reduced deployment failures by 50% through robust CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins.

Mentored 3 junior developers through comprehensive code reviews, establishing high coding standards and providing preventative architectural solutions that guaranteed high code quality and seamless integration.

experiences.title: System Engineer
experiences.companyDescription: India's no 1 IT service based firm
points: Developed RESTful APIs using Spring Boot, improving application performance by 40%, making existing implementations leaner and supporting over 3,000 concurrent users.
Enhanced existing Create Catalog Automation product, reducing 80% manual effort of creating new catalogs.
Achieved Reject Report Generation Service, reducing manual effort by 70% and generated over 100+ reports per day.
Documented development processes by creating comprehensive guides that improved onboarding efficiency for new team members.

experiences.title: Associate Developer
experiences.companyDescription: A SAP software consultancy start-up firm
points: Developed user-friendly educational platform app using SAPUI5, JavaScript, and HTML/CSS.
Enhanced user engagement through responsive design and interactive features, supporting over 1000 active users.
Implemented test-driven development (TDD) approach to ensure code quality and efficiency.
Designed and executed test plans and test cases including regression, performance and functionality tests.
Reduced downtime and improved productivity through rigorous testing and continuous improvement.

skills.items: Spring Boot, Spring Web, Spring REST, Hibernate ORM, Nodejs
Eclipse, Intellij, GitLab, Git, Jira, Jenkins, Postman, Swagger UI
